# Security controls catalog

| ID | Requirement |
| --- | --- |
| C-1 | Applications MUST use TLS 1.2 or higher for HTTPS connections. |
| C-2 | Clients SHOULD NOT send secrets in URLs. |

4.2.1 The gateway MUST validate JWTs before forwarding requests to internal services.

3.1 Servers MUST use TLS for all inbound connections.
